name: claude-skills
description: Comprehensive PDLC skills collection: 454 standards-grounded skills and 173 commands across 8 roles — architect, engineer, product manager, tech lead, security, designer, QA engineer, and cross-role SDLC. Every skill includes LLM error mitigation anti-patterns.

plugins.name: architect-system-design
plugins.description: Architecture patterns, system decomposition, DDD, microservices, event-driven, CQRS. Grounded in TOGAF, IASA BTABoK, ISO 42010.

plugins.name: architect-quality-attributes
plugins.description: Non-functional requirements, scalability, reliability, performance modeling, trade-off analysis.

plugins.name: architect-decision-making
plugins.description: ADRs, technology radar, build-vs-buy, migration strategy, vendor evaluation.

plugins.name: architect-data-architecture
plugins.description: Data modeling, storage selection, event sourcing, data governance, pipeline design.

plugins.name: architect-infrastructure-design
plugins.description: Cloud architecture, deployment topology, DR planning, multi-region, container orchestration.

plugins.name: architect-governance
plugins.description: Architecture principles, fitness functions, tech debt assessment, compliance frameworks.

plugins.name: architect-communication
plugins.description: C4 diagrams, RFCs, stakeholder presentations, architecture roadmaps, sequence diagrams.

plugins.name: architect-toolkit
plugins.description: Architecture katas, review facilitation, mentoring, anti-patterns catalog, system audits.

plugins.name: engineer-code-quality
plugins.description: Clean code, refactoring, SOLID principles, code smell detection, complexity analysis.

plugins.name: engineer-testing
plugins.description: TDD, property-based testing, test architecture, mutation testing, test data management.

plugins.name: engineer-debugging
plugins.description: Systematic debugging, root cause analysis, memory leaks, concurrency, postmortems.

plugins.name: engineer-implementation-patterns
plugins.description: Design patterns, data structures, algorithms, concurrency, functional and reactive patterns.

plugins.name: engineer-api-development
plugins.description: REST, GraphQL, gRPC API design, versioning, documentation, rate limiting, testing.

plugins.name: engineer-devops-practices
plugins.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, deployment strategies, monitoring, feature flags.

plugins.name: engineer-database-engineering
plugins.description: Schema design, query optimization, migrations, indexing, transaction management.

plugins.name: engineer-toolkit
plugins.description: Technical writing, git workflow, code review checklists, incident response, on-call runbooks.

plugins.name: pm-discovery
plugins.description: Problem discovery, customer research, opportunity assessment, assumption mapping.

plugins.name: pm-strategy
plugins.description: Product vision, positioning, value proposition, business model, OKR definition.

plugins.name: pm-prioritization
plugins.description: RICE scoring, Kano analysis, cost-of-delay, roadmap design, trade-off evaluation.

plugins.name: pm-requirements
plugins.description: PRDs, user story mapping, acceptance criteria, feature specs, edge case analysis.

plugins.name: pm-analytics
plugins.description: Metrics frameworks, experiment design, funnel/cohort analysis, data storytelling.

plugins.name: pm-launch
plugins.description: Launch planning, go-to-market, beta programs, rollout strategy, readiness checklists.

plugins.name: pm-stakeholder-management
plugins.description: Stakeholder mapping, executive summaries, decision logs, cross-functional alignment.

plugins.name: pm-toolkit
plugins.description: Product reviews, retrospectives, one-pagers, briefs, customer advisory boards.

plugins.name: tech-lead-planning
plugins.description: Technical roadmaps, estimation, sprint planning, capacity planning, dependency mapping.

plugins.name: tech-lead-code-review
plugins.description: Code review standards, quality gates, review culture, constructive feedback patterns.

plugins.name: tech-lead-team-development
plugins.description: Mentoring plans, 1:1 templates, skill matrices, career ladders, onboarding programs.

plugins.name: tech-lead-decision-making
plugins.description: RFC processes, technology evaluation, build-vs-buy, spike plans, decision matrices.

plugins.name: tech-lead-process-engineering
plugins.description: Development workflows, branching strategies, release management, incident processes.

plugins.name: tech-lead-cross-functional
plugins.description: Product partnership, design handoff, stakeholder communication, scope negotiation.

plugins.name: tech-lead-engineering-excellence
plugins.description: Coding standards, developer experience, tooling strategy, testing and monitoring.

plugins.name: tech-lead-toolkit
plugins.description: Tech lead journal, team health checks, retrospectives, team charters, hiring.

plugins.name: security-threat-modeling
plugins.description: STRIDE analysis, attack trees, trust boundaries, risk scoring. Grounded in NIST, MITRE ATT&CK.

plugins.name: security-secure-development
plugins.description: Secure coding review, OWASP Top 10, authentication/authorization design, cryptography.

plugins.name: security-application-security
plugins.description: SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, penetration test scoping, API security review.

plugins.name: security-infrastructure
plugins.description: Cloud security posture, network segmentation, container/K8s security, zero-trust.

plugins.name: security-compliance
plugins.description: GDPR, SOC2, PCI-DSS compliance mapping, audit preparation, data classification.

plugins.name: security-incident-response
plugins.description: IR planning, forensic analysis, containment, evidence preservation, postmortems.

plugins.name: security-operations
plugins.description: SIEM rules, detection engineering, vulnerability management, threat intelligence.

plugins.name: security-toolkit
plugins.description: Security champion programs, awareness training, red team exercises, bug bounty.

plugins.name: designer-research
plugins.description: User research: personas, empathy maps, journey maps, interviews, usability testing, JTBD.

plugins.name: designer-systems
plugins.description: Design systems: tokens, components, accessibility, theming, documentation.

plugins.name: designer-ux-strategy
plugins.description: UX strategy: competitive analysis, design principles, experience mapping, alignment.

plugins.name: designer-ui-design
plugins.description: UI design: color systems, typography, layout grids, responsive design, data viz.

plugins.name: designer-interaction
plugins.description: Interaction design: micro-animations, state machines, gestures, error handling, feedback.

plugins.name: designer-prototyping-testing
plugins.description: Prototyping and testing: wireframes, usability heuristics, A/B test design.

plugins.name: designer-ops
plugins.description: Design operations: critique, handoff specs, sprint planning, team workflows.

plugins.name: designer-toolkit
plugins.description: Designer utilities: rationale, presentations, case studies, UX writing, adoption.

plugins.name: qa-test-strategy
plugins.description: Test planning, risk-based testing, coverage analysis, test pyramid, strategy documentation. Grounded in ISTQB, ISO 25010.

plugins.name: qa-functional-testing
plugins.description: Equivalence partitioning, boundary analysis, decision tables, state transitions, use case testing, error guessing.

plugins.name: qa-automation
plugins.description: Test automation frameworks, page object model, CI integration, flaky test management, automation ROI.

plugins.name: qa-performance-testing
plugins.description: Load testing, stress testing, capacity planning, performance profiling, SLA validation.

plugins.name: qa-api-testing
plugins.description: API contract testing, integration testing, mock services, schema validation, API security testing.

plugins.name: qa-quality-metrics
plugins.description: Defect metrics, test effectiveness, quality dashboards, process improvement, release readiness.

plugins.name: qa-accessibility-testing
plugins.description: WCAG compliance, screen reader testing, keyboard navigation, color contrast, ARIA validation.

plugins.name: qa-toolkit
plugins.description: Bug reports, test environment management, exploratory testing, regression strategy, QA process.

plugins.name: sdlc-cross-role
plugins.description: Cross-functional SDLC workflows: phase gates, definitions of ready/done, feature lifecycle, release checklists, incident-to-improvement, compliance traceability. Grounded in ISO/IEC 12207, 15288.
